# Abstract Machines Hardware

> Abstract Machines is an open-source IoT hardware company based in Paris, France (141 Quai de Valmy, 75010). We design and manufacture the S0 and S1 modular IoT gateways for smart metering, industrial automation, and edge computing. The S0 is a Zephyr RTOS-based wireless gateway built on the ESP32-C6 RISC-V SoC, supporting Wireless M-Bus 868 MHz, NB-IoT, LTE-M, WiFi 6 (802.11ax), and BLE 5. The S1 pairs the S0 module with a BeagleV-Fire RISC-V SBC running full Linux, enabling containerised workloads and edge AI inference. Both products are open-source hardware under Apache License 2.0. Funded by EU Horizon Europe grant ELASTIC (No. 101139067).

## Products

- [S0 IoT Gateway](https://hardware.absmach.eu/s0) — Wireless IoT gateway powered by ESP32-C6 RISC-V. Supports Wireless M-Bus (868 MHz), NB-IoT, LTE-M, WiFi 6, and BLE 5. Runs Zephyr RTOS. Low-power, DIN-rail ready.
- [S1 IoT Gateway](https://hardware.absmach.eu/s1) — Linux-based industrial IoT gateway combining the S0 module with BeagleV-Fire RISC-V. Supports containerised workloads, edge AI inference, and protocol translation.
- [S0 Base Board](https://hardware.absmach.eu/docs/base-board) — Expansion board with W5500 Ethernet, TSS721A M-Bus transceiver, SD card logging, and robust power management.

## Documentation

- [Documentation Index](https://hardware.absmach.eu/docs) — Full hardware and software documentation
- [S0 Gateway Docs](https://hardware.absmach.eu/docs/s0-gateway) — Architecture, pinouts, getting started
- [S0 Getting Started](https://hardware.absmach.eu/docs/s0-gateway/getting-started) — Setup and first flash
- [S0 Architecture](https://hardware.absmach.eu/docs/s0-gateway/architecture) — Hardware architecture overview
- [S0 Software](https://hardware.absmach.eu/docs/s0-gateway/software) — MQTT, CoAP, HTTP, WebSockets, WiFi
- [S1 Gateway Docs](https://hardware.absmach.eu/docs/s1-gateway) — Linux-based gateway documentation
- [Base Board Docs](https://hardware.absmach.eu/docs/base-board) — Schematics, pinouts, expansion

## Key Technical Facts

- S0 processor: ESP32-C6 (RISC-V, 160 MHz)
- S0 wireless: Wireless M-Bus 868 MHz, NB-IoT, LTE-M, WiFi 6 (802.11ax), BLE 5.0
- S0 RTOS: Zephyr RTOS, Apache-2.0
- S1 compute: BeagleV-Fire (RISC-V, PolarFire SoC)
- S1 OS: Linux (full userspace, container support)
- Base Board connectivity: W5500 Ethernet, M-Bus wired (TSS721A), SD card
- License: Apache License 2.0
- EU grant: ELASTIC project, Horizon Europe No. 101139067

## Company

- Website: https://absmach.eu
